description_long: This jewelry set features a matching necklace and pair of earrings, both displayed on a white bust stand. The necklace is composed of alternating round and cylindrical beads in shades of light blue, black, and white, with intricate swirling patterns on some of the cylindrical beads. The beads are strung together in a symmetrical arrangement, with the largest beads positioned at the center and gradually decreasing in size toward the clasp. The earrings mirror the necklace's design, each featuring a dangling blue bead suspended from a small white bead and a metallic hook. The necklace is finished with a string of small, glossy black beads at the back, providing a secure closure. The overall design is bold and eye-catching, with a playful yet sophisticated color palette and motif.
description: A coordinated necklace and earring set featuring blue, black, and white beads with swirling patterns, displayed on a white bust. The design is bold, symmetrical, and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full necklace and both earrings, highlighting the bead arrangement and decorative patterns.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing the necklace's profile and the depth of the beads, with the earring partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the string of small black beads and the clasp area, with no earrings visible.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the necklace's profile and bead arrangement from the opposite angle.
